description: A designed DHS self-deportation promo graphic styled as an airline ticket / boarding pass. The top portion is a white 'ticket' panel bordered by red bands, with a vertical barcode down the left edge and a dashed perforation line down the right edge, mimicking a tear-off ticket stub. The U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal sits centered at the very top. In huge bold navy condensed text the ticket reads 'FREE TICKET HOME'. Below, on a dark textured navy background, yellow bold text states '$1,000 to Self-Deport', followed by white text: 'Non-criminal illegal aliens can access travel assistance on their own terms to avoid arrest and earn a stipend for returning home.' and bold 'There is no excuse to not self deport.' A red rounded pill button at the bottom reads 'Visit DHS.gov/CBPHome'. The boarding-pass metaphor and cash incentive are designed to make voluntary departure ('self-deportation') via the CBP Home App seem easy, rewarding, and urgent. Target audience: undocumented immigrants, pressuring them to leave voluntarily under threat of arrest.
notable_text: FREE TICKET HOME; $1,000 to Self-Deport; There is no excuse to not self deport.; Visit DHS.gov/CBPHome
